commit.name: Interactive Periodic Table
commit.description: CSS Grid periodic table with category coloring, search, and detail panel
commit.prompt:
Build an interactive periodic table of elements.

Layout:
- CSS Grid: 18 columns. Place each element using gridRow and gridColumn from its data.
- Each cell: symbol (large, centered), atomic number (small, top-left)
- Color-code by category using design tokens (e.g., noble-gas → one color, halogen → another)
- Search input at top — filters by name or symbol (case-insensitive)
- Click an element → detail panel below grid shows: name, symbol, atomicNumber, atomicWeight, category
- Legend showing each category with its color

All element data comes from props.elements. Use design system CSS variables.

issues.description: The main component (ui.tsx) is truncated, meaning the search input, grid container (18 columns), and final assembly of the periodic table are not present in the provided source.
issues.fix: Complete the ui.tsx file by implementing the search input field and a Box/div with display: grid and grid-template-columns: repeat(18, 1fr).

issues.description: CSS Variable nesting bug: ElementCell attempts to wrap the colorToken in a var() function, but the getColorToken helper in constants.ts already returns a full var() string, resulting in invalid CSS (e.g., var(--ggui-color-var(--ggui-color-...))).
issues.fix: In ElementCell, change the background prop to use colorToken directly: background={colorToken}. Ensure the mapping function returns just the token name or that the consumer handles the string correctly.

issues.description: Element name text within the cell might overflow on smaller grid cells despite truncation if the font size isn't responsive.
issues.fix: Use a smaller font size or hidden overflow for the name label in the ElementCell.

evaluations.critique: The sub-component architecture is highly professional, featuring excellent accessibility (ARIA labels/keyboard support) and polished animations. However, the code is incomplete as the main UI assembly is missing, and there is a significant logic error regarding design token string concatenation in the cell component.

evaluation.critique: The component demonstrates strong data rendering and interactive polish with proper keyboard support and visual feedback, but has inconsistent design token usage with several hardcoded color values (e.g., '#0284c7', '#d4d4d8', rgba fallbacks) and inline pixel dimensions that should use spacing tokens. The grid layout is correct but some inline styles bypass the design system.
